---
name: Pull request
description: Submit changes to notes, site config, or infrastructure.
title: "[PR] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## What does this PR do?

A clear and concise description of the changes.

## Linked issue

Fixes #<issue_number> (if applicable).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New content (note, reference, or section)
- [ ] Infrastructure (build, workflow, design system)
- [ ] Documentation (typo, clarification)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Breaking change (please describe)

## How has it been verified?

- [ ] Local Jekyll build passes (`bundle exec jekyll serve`)
- [ ] Math renders correctly on the affected page
- [ ] Linked pages still resolve
- [ ] Markdown lint passes
- [ ] Reviewed in light AND dark mode of one or more themes

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contribution notes](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the existing math + Markdown style
- [ ] I have added appropriate references for new content
- [ ] I have not introduced trailing whitespace or unrelated edits
